issue_title: Behavior at the end of play
issue_body_preview:
Hi :),
I have some trouble playing the last seconds of my video using rx-player library.
After some research I found that there is a END_OF_PLAY constant : 
```

test_description_zh: 使用 rx-player 播放一段视频，观察视频播放到最后几秒时的播放行为，特别关注视频是否能完整播放到结尾。
expected_result_zh: 视频应能正常播放至最后一秒并自然结束，不应在视频结束前提前停止播放。
